element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core stealth foundation; players learn to read visibility feedback and navigate dark spaces
Complementary to light; teaches players to manage both visual and auditory exposure

element_introduction_order.element: Basic NPC patrol routes (stationary or walking guards)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn to read NPC behavior patterns and plan movement around predictable paths
Introduces problem-solving; players discover multiple solutions to same obstacle

element_introduction_order.element: NPC reaction system (alert states based on visual/aural cues)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Teaches consequence management; suspicion escalation requires reading NPC states

element_introduction_order.element: Object-based distraction (throwing items to mislead NPCs)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Active stealth option; misdirection as alternative to pure avoidance

element_introduction_order.element: NPC categorization (guards vs servants vs non-human)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Differentiated threat assessment; varying NPC response types require tactical flexibility
Last-resort option; limited proficiency reflects character design; taught through failure consequences
Post-introduction replayability; higher difficulties add optional challenge constraints

typical_relief_triggers: Successfully reaching safe dark space after detection risk
NPC losing alert status and returning to patrol
Completing a stealth objective without incident
Finding alternative route that avoids high-guard density areas
Distance increasing between player and nearest NPC
typical_tension_triggers: NPC entering alert state after seeing/hearing disturbance
Footstep noise on hard surfaces near NPCs
Discovery of player's body displacement or interference
Encountering unexpected NPC in planned route
Objective change or new objective added mid-mission
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical tension management: players build toward objectives through careful planning, execute movement with constant micro-tension (am I visible? audible?), experience relief at successful positioning, then cycle repeats with next obstacle. Macro-tension rises as mission progresses toward primary objective completion. Unscripted environments create unpredictable tension spikes.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Dark/shadowy areas contrast with lit areas; shadows signal safety and concealment opportunity; lighting architecture guides optional vs. mandatory paths
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Maze-like level design with emergent solution discovery; non-obvious routes rewarded; vertical climbing and alternative passages encourage exploration

difficulty_curve.early_game: Simple objectives (steal specific object) in relatively open spaces; limited NPC density; focus on learning light/sound mechanics and basic patrol reading
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased NPC variety and patrol complexity; environment-based obstacle solving; introduction of consequence systems (body hiding); alert state escalation becomes significant threat
difficulty_curve.late_game: Multiple interconnected objectives; high-density guard areas; minimal margin for error; compound consequence management required
notable_spikes: First guard encounter with alert mechanic (mid-game transition)
Missions with multiple NPC categories present simultaneously
High-difficulty settings adding no-kill or loot constraints retroactively to learned levels

notable_level_patterns.description: Early portion of mission focuses on reaching primary objective location; tension builds through progressive NPC encounters; players plan route and gather intelligence
Post-objective phase often requires exiting mission area; may trigger additional objectives; heightened tension due to changed alert status or time pressure
Locked doors, climbing challenges, and obstacle navigation woven throughout; unscripted design allows multiple solution approaches; emergent gameplay arises from environmental interaction
Levels alternate between high-guard areas and sparse regions; spacing allows tension/relief cycling; safe zones exist for regrouping strategy
